{{Sidebar with collapsible lists
|name     = Utopia
|class = plainlist
|pretitle = Part of [[:Category:Utopias|a series]] on
|titlestyle = font-size:200%;font-weight:normal;
|title = [[Utopia]]s
|image = [[File:2010_Utopien_arche04.jpg|200px]]
|headingstyle = background:#ddddff;
|expanded = {{{expanded|}}}
|heading1 = Mythical and Religious
|content1 = {{flatlist|
* [[Arcadia (utopia)|Arcadia]]
* [[City of the Caesars]]
* [[Cloud cuckoo land]]
** [[Cockaigne]]
* [[Garden of Eden|Eden]]
* [[Garden of the gods (Sumerian paradise)|Garden of the gods]]
* [[Shangri-La]]
* [[Golden Age]]
** ''[[Satya Yuga]]''
* [[Great Unity]]
* [[Ketumati]]
* [[Kingdom of God]]
* [[Kingdom of Opona|Opona]]
* [[Mag Mell]]
* [[Mahoroba]]
* [[Merry England]]
* [[Mezzoramia]]
* [[Mount Penglai]]
* [[New world order (Bahá'í)|Most Great Peace]]
* [[New Jerusalem]]
* [[Zion]]
}}
|heading2 = [[List of utopian literature|Utopian fiction]]
|heading3 = Theory
|content3 = {{flatlist|
* ''[[Communitas perfecta]]''
* [[Communist society]]
* [[Heterotopia (space)|Heterotopia]]
* [[Ideal city]]
** [[Sforzinda]]
* [[Pantisocracy]]
* [[Real utopian sociology]]
* [[Utopian studies]]
* [[Third International Theory]]
}}
|heading4 = Ideas
|content4 = {{flatlist|
* [[Agriculturalism]]
* [[Escapism]]
* [[Millenarianism]]
* [[Technological utopianism|Technological]]
** [[Cyber-utopianism]]
** [[Post-scarcity economy]]
** [[Transhumanism]]
* [[Utopian socialism]] 
}}
|heading5 = Reality related to utopia
|content5 = {{flatlist|
* [[Utopian architecture|Architecture]]
* [[Hospitality exchange service|HosPex]]
* [[Intentional community]]
** [[Atarashiki-mura]]
** [[Auroville]]
** [[Egalitarian community|Egalitarian]]
** [[List of American utopian communities|in USA]]
** [[Sustainable community|Sustainable]]
* [[Open borders]]
* Organizations
** [[American Union of Associationists|Associationists]]
** [[Anthroposophical Society|Anthroposophs]]
** [[Lindisfarne Association|Lindisfarne]]
** [[The Millennium Project|Millennium]]
** [[World Future Society|WSF]]
** [[The Zeitgeist Movement|Zeitgeist]]
* [[Pirate utopia]]
* [[Universal Basic Income|UBI]]
}}

}}<noinclude>
[[Category:Utopias|*]]
</noinclude>
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
